hero.title: Leaders Hall
introBody: Leadership in Mōchirīī rests on shared care. Each role carries its own work, and all of them help keep the guild fair, steady & enjoyable for everyone.

panel.title: Guild Leadership
body: Leaders may keep a short profile page for introductions, preferred roles & the best way to reach them. Keep it in-game, keep it safe, and leave personal info out.
panel.note: Members start with their hall leader for most questions. Requests that affect multiple halls move to the vice leader. Matters that shape policy, long-term direction, or unresolved outcomes move to the guild leader.

council.title: The Council
council.description: These are the contact points for support, planning & keeping the guild steady and fair.

leaders.name: Twills
leaders.summary: Guides culture, care & long-term direction for Mōchirīī.

leaders.name: Vice Leader
leaders.summary: Keeps hall work steady, coordinates leaders & helps resolve issues that reach beyond one group.

leaders.name: Hall Leader
leaders.summary: First contact for member support, event coordination & keeping the hall active & welcoming.

leaders.name: Isawisima
leaders.summary: Protects fairness & tone, helps mediate conflict & keeps standards steady across halls.

leaders.name: Sinbell
leaders.summary: Supports member well-being, guides new arrivals & helps keep morale alive during busy weeks.

leaders.name: Meenari
leaders.summary: Keeps daily community spaces active, welcomes arrivals & helps members find their footing quickly.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
responsibilities.description: Members receive clear direction, fair decisions & reliable support. Leadership keeps structure, protects culture & stays present. Members participate in good faith, communicate responsibly & contribute to the guild's shared pace.

items.title: Direction & strategy
items.description: Sets goals, priorities & the long road for the guild.

items.title: Ops & coordination
items.description: Organizes events, manages roles & keeps daily guild work running smoothly.

items.title: Culture & people
items.description: Maintains standards, resolves conflicts & sustains morale so the hall stays steady.
